description: If fashionable comfort is what you are looking for in your footwear, then here's that perfect pair for you! The fila Vintage Hi-Ankle sneaker is a great buy, what with its lightweight cushioned comfort and stylish look. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a nubuck lining around the collar and nubuck strip at the back leg Synthetic leather and colourful PU strips on the side midfoot for enhanced style Embroidered branding on lateral ankle for added style Lace-up system through metallic eyelets for a snug, customised Fit Colourful fabric inner lining with a padded tongue and collar for all-day sweat-free comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Colourful cushioned fabric footbed for all-day, sweat-free comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Rubber foxing along the outer periphery for enhanced durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole with design grooves throughout the footbed for ultimate grip and traction even on smooth surfaces shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
